---
title: "Reports"
---

Place PDFs in the `files/` folder and link them here.

## Precision Tracking {#precision-tracking}
- Placeholder for quarterly CI width tracking notes/plots.

## VRF {#vrf}
- Placeholder for Variance Reduction Factor notes/plots.

## Downloads
- Explosion audit summary (PDF): [files/explosion-audit-sample-size-analysis.pdf](files/explosion-audit-sample-size-analysis.pdf){target="_blank"}
- EVT notes (PDF): [files/evt-notes.pdf](files/evt-notes.pdf){target="_blank"}
